mapper.select: SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, i.par_issue_code AS parIssueCode, i.type_code AS typeCode, i.title AS title, u.name AS name FROM issues i LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.type_code = #{typeCode} ORDER BY i.issue_code

SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, i.par_issue_code AS parIssueCode, i.type_code AS typeCode, i.title AS title, u.name AS name FROM issues i LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY i.issue_code

SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, i.par_issue_code AS parIssueCode, i.type_code AS typeCode, i.title AS title, u.name AS name FROM issues i LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.assignee_code = #{loginUserCode} ORDER BY i.issue_code
